name: Toolbar
description: A container grouping controls (buttons, menubuttons, checkboxes) that reduces tab stops by treating the toolbar as a single tab stop with arrow key navigation.

keyboard_interactions.action: Moves focus into toolbar on first or previously focused control
Moves focus out of the toolbar
Moves focus to previous control (horizontal); optionally wraps
Moves focus to next control (horizontal); optionally wraps

optional_attributes.description: vertical for vertical; default is horizontal

notes: Use roving tabindex for focus management within the toolbar
Disabled controls should be focusable but not operable
